titles.title: Am I a Soldier of the Cross

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v7 v9 v7 v10

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Am I a soldier of the cross, A follower of the Lamb, And shall I fear to won His cause, Or blush to speak His Name?

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And when the battle’s over, we shall wear a crown! Yes, we shall wear a crown! Yes, we shall wear a crown! In the new Jerusalem. Wear a crown, wear a crown. Wear a bright and shining crown. And when the battle’s over, we shall wear a crown In the new Jerusalem.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Must I be carried to the skies On flow’ry beds of ease, While others fought to win the prize, And sailed through bloody seas?

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Are there no foes for me to face? Must I not stem the flood? Is this vile world a friend to grace To help me on to God?

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Sure I must fight if I would reign, Increase my courage, Lord; I’ll bear the toil, endure the pain, Supported by Thy Word.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Let me walk, blessed Lord, in the way Thou hast gone, Leading straight to the land above; Giving cheer everywhere to the sad and the lone, Fill my way every day with love.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Fill my way every day with love, As I walk with the heav'nly Dove; Let me go all the while with a song and a smile, Fill my way every day with love.

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Keep me close to the side of my Saviour and guide, Let me never in darkness rove; Keep my path free from wrath and my soul satisfied, Fill my way every day with love.

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Soon this race will be o'er and I'll travel no more, But abide in my home above; Let me sing, blessed King, all the way to that shore, Fill my way every day with love.

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: At the cross, at the cross, Where I first saw the light, And the burden of my heart rolled away, It was there by faith I received my sight, And now I am happy all the day!
